domain: terracotta army production (central clay processing + modular molded body parts from finite catalog + hand-finished individual faces + 80+ distinct workshops with maker's stamps fired into clay for provenance)
specific_mechanism: Mass production at scale with individuality preserved at the face/detail level and provenance preserved via fired-in maker stamps. Body parts are interchangeable from a small mold catalog; faces are uniquely sculpted; workshops are identifiable.
llm_application: Stamped modular-mold expert composition (SMMEC): (1) catalog of mold-experts — 10-20 base behavioral modules trained from curated central corpus. (2) per-generation, pull one base mold-expert + one hand-finished face module. (3) every output carries a provenance-stamp tuple (mold-id, face-id, workshop-key) as a low-entropy invisible watermark. Each generation = one mold + one face + workshop attribution.
novelty_claim: AoE/Chimera (2506.14794) interpolates parent MoE offline. AgentSquare modularizes agent roles. None retrieve a per-output assembly with (finite-mold-catalog, hand-finished-face-module, workshop-stamp provenance) triad.
